name: Elizabeth Granato
bio: Elizabeth Granato is the Bureau Chief of the Cook County Bureau of Asset Management and wife of State Senator Ram Villivalam. She is the frontrunner in the open District 12 race (incumbent Bridget Degnen is retiring). She holds an extensive list of endorsements from U.S. Congress members, state legislators, labor unions, and the Chicago Tribune.
prior_office: Bureau Chief, Cook County Bureau of Asset Management

jacket.source: Illinois State Board of Elections (not retrieved)
jacket.note: Likely the most-funded candidate in this race given endorsement roster

red_flags.label: Spousal political connection
red_flags.detail: Husband Ram Villivalam is an IL State Senator; potential conflicts if both serve in overlapping jurisdictions.

career_history.role: Bureau Chief, Cook County Bureau of Asset Management

endorsements: Scott Britton (Cook County Commissioner, District 12 predecessor)
Samantha Nugent (Chicago City Council President Pro Tempore)
